era: 2000s-present. Hip-Hop DJ and live performer. E=5 -- live performance energy. Mass Line Media collective. FOURTH ENTRY for Sabzi spanning 41 degrees (99, 101, 122, 140). Most entries by any figure.

location.formative: Seattle hip-hop scene -- Blue Scholars, Common Market, solo production, Mass Line Media. Iranian-American producer/DJ.
location.career: Sabzi (Saba Mohajerjasbi). Four S36 entries: Blue Scholars (99), Common Market (101), production (122), DJ (140). Mass Line Media. The most-entered figure in the engine.

members.name: Sabzi
members.note: Saba Mohajerjasbi. Fourth entry in S36 engine (99, 101, 122, 140). 41-degree span -- widest range of any figure. This entry documents the live DJ and performance dimension. Mass Line Media collective. Iranian-American. E=5 live performance energy.

associated_musicians.name: Geologic
associated_musicians.note: Prometheus Brown. Filipino-American MC. Blue Scholars duo. Sabzi's first S36 entry.

associated_musicians.name: RA Scion
associated_musicians.note: Common Market duo. Jazz-influenced hip-hop. Sabzi's second entry.

associated_musicians.name: Vitamin D
associated_musicians.note: Conception Records. E=5. CD producer/DJ. Sabzi and Vitamin D represent different nodes in Seattle's production network.

associated_musicians.name: Jake One
associated_musicians.note: G-Unit / Rhymesayers. E=5. National crossover. Three Seattle producers: Sabzi (122/140), Vitamin D (138), Jake One (139).

associated_musicians.name: DJ Riz
associated_musicians.note: 206 Zulu. E=5. Community turntablist. Sabzi's DJ entry connects to the DJ lineage.

theory_nodes.concept: Fourth entry for Sabzi -- most entries by any figure; 41-degree span (99-140); four facets: Blue Scholars (group), Common Market (group), production (solo), DJ (live); the full lifecycle of a hip-hop multi-hyphenate
examples: 99: Blue Scholars (E=5). Producer/MC duo with Geologic.
101: Common Market (E=4). Producer/MC duo with RA Scion.
140: DJ (E=5). Live performance. Mass Line Media.
theory_nodes.description: Four entries, 41 degrees. Most appearances. Four facets of one career.

genealogy.relationship: Sabzi DJ at 140 completes the four-entry arc.

theory_nodes.concept: Mass Line Media -- collective model; beyond traditional labels; events, releases, community; the evolution from Mass Line Records through Mass Line Media
examples: Collective model: collaboration, shared resources, community over commerce.
Event platform: DJ nights, release parties, community gatherings.
Release platform: DJ mixes, instrumentals, collaborative works.
Evolution: Mass Line Records (label) to Mass Line Media (collective).
theory_nodes.description: Mass Line Media. Collective model. Events and releases.

genealogy.relationship: Mass Line Media at 140. Collective infrastructure.

theory_nodes.concept: E=5 energy arc -- Sabzi's energy across four entries: E=5 (Blue Scholars, performance), E=4 (Common Market, relaxed), E=4 (production, studio), E=5 (DJ, performance); performance entries at E=5, studio entries at E=4
examples: 99: E=5 -- Blue Scholars live performance energy.
122: E=4 -- solo production, introverted studio work.
140: E=5 -- DJ live performance energy. Returns to E=5.
theory_nodes.description: Sabzi energy arc: 5, 4, 4, 5. Performance high, studio lower.

genealogy.relationship: Sabzi DJ at 140 returns to E=5 performance energy.

cross_references.relationship: SAME FIGURE! Production (122, E=4, studio) and DJ (140, E=5, live). Introverted to extroverted. Studio to stage. 18-degree gap.
FIRST ENTRY! Blue Scholars (99, E=5, duo with Geologic). The starting point. 41 degrees to the fourth entry. Performance energy matches.
SECOND ENTRY! Common Market (101, E=4, duo with RA Scion). Jazz-influenced. Two degrees after the first entry.
SEATTLE PRODUCERS/DJS! Vitamin D (138, E=5, Conception, local) and Sabzi (140, E=5, Mass Line, collective). Both producer-DJs. Different labels.
PRODUCER PROXIMITY! Jake One (139, E=5, national) immediately before Sabzi DJ (140, E=5, collective). Back-to-back Seattle figures.
